nasb.text: Now in that day the glory of Jacob will fade, And the fatness of his flesh will become lean.

esv.text: And in that day the glory of Jacob will be brought low, and the fat of his flesh will grow lean.

cnv.text: “到那日，雅各的榮耀必衰落， 他肥胖的身體必消瘦。

ccb.text: “到那日，雅各的荣耀必消失， 他肥胖的身躯必渐渐消瘦。

csbs.text: “到那日， 雅各的荣耀必衰微， 他肥壮的身体必消瘦；
